overall.description: Third-person gameplay from GTA: Vice City Definitive Edition showing the protagonist Tommy Vercetti exploring a beachfront promenade at sunset. The character walks along palm-lined paths, approaches the sandy beach, and inspects a parked black sedan while the sky displays vibrant purple and orange dusk colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with palm trees and resort buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved promenade lined with palm trees and street lamps

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the walkway with detailed fronds
low-rise curved building with lit windows and retro architecture
illuminated street lamp casting warm light
ocean visible in the distance with sunset reflection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a beachfront promenade at dusk, with the character walking along a paved path lined with palm trees. Art deco resort buildings sit on the left while the ocean is visible to the right. Street lamps provide warm illumination against the purple sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach area with scattered palm trees

events.description: character steps from paved promenade onto sandy beach surface
character turns left and looks up at tall palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking on the beach sand, turning to look up at palm trees and approaching a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the distance near the palm trees

entered.detail: sandy ground surface of the beach area
metal fence separating the beach from the drop to the shore
high-rise building visible when looking back toward the city

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the sandy beach area, leaving the paved promenade behind. The camera turns to show tall palm trees silhouetted against the colorful dusk sky. A distant pedestrian walks near the tree line, and a tall modern building becomes visible when looking back toward the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront parking area with ocean view

events.description: character approaches and begins circling a parked black sedan
character stops circling and looks out at the ocean horizon

agents.ego_description: circling around a parked black sedan and observing the vehicle and beach surroundings

notable_agents.action: black sedan parked on the sand facing the ocean, character walking around it

entered.detail: classic black sedan with chrome details parked on the beach sand
distinctive high-rise with yellow and gray facade visible from the beach

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a black sedan parked on the sand and walks around it, inspecting the vehicle from multiple angles. The camera circles the car while showing the ocean horizon and a distinctive tall yellow building in the background. The segment ends with the character standing near the car looking out at the sunset over the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured beachfront promenade into the open expanse of a sandy beach at dusk. It begins with the character walking along a paved path lined with palm trees and Art deco resort buildings, where warm street lamps glow against a purple sunset sky. As the character leaves the pavement behind, the scene shifts to the sandy shoreline, passing silhouetted palm trees and a distant pedestrian while a modern city building emerges in the background. The camera then circles a black sedan parked on the sand, inspecting the vehicle from multiple angles with the ocean horizon and a tall yellow building visible behind it. Finally, the movement settles as the character stands beside the car, looking out over the water toward the fading sunset.
